name: rldyour-browser
description: Браузерная проверка и debug для Playwright/DevTools. EN: Browser validation and debugging workflows.

interface.longDescription: Браузерные workflows Codex с обязательным CloakBrowser preflight. EN: This skills-only plugin routes every browser action through exact managed Playwright CLI or the approved Chrome DevTools MCP wrapper after a fail-closed CloakBrowser health check. Historical Webwright prompts use a compatibility skill that never starts Webwright. Browser artifacts such as screenshots, videos, traces, PDFs, and temporary evidence must be written under browser/ and treated as ignored local artifacts unless the owner explicitly asks to preserve them.
defaultPrompt: Используй $browser-validation: проверь UI в браузере через Playwright CLI evidence. EN: browser validation.
Используй $browser-debug: консоль, сеть, runtime через Chrome DevTools MCP. EN: browser debug.
Используй $browser-tool-routing: выбери managed Playwright CLI или DevTools. EN: route browser providers.
